message:
docs: add rustdoc to 10 undocumented public API types

Add concise one-line summaries to high-impact public structs/enums:
- config.rs: EffectiveConfig, EffectivePaths
- config_profiles.rs: ConfigProfileManifest, ConfigProfileManifestEntry,
  ConfigProfileSummary
- native_events.rs: NativePaneState, NativeEvent, NativeEventListener
- ipc.rs: IpcRpcRequest, IpcAuth, IpcServer (non-unix stub)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
